---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose new features or suggestions for the project
title: "[FEATURE] Concise description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Feature Description**
Describe the desired feature in a clear and concise manner.

**Problem Solved**
Explain how this feature solves existing problems or improves the project.

**Implementation Suggestions**
If possible, provide suggestions on how to implement this feature.

**Alternative Solutions**
Describe alternative solutions you have considered.

**Additional Information**
Add any other information related to the feature request.
